name: Index Builder
notes: Phase B.2 Index Builder / Incremental Indexer (D1 fourth target after 103→104→105-slice). Layer 2 file remains prompts/modules/102-incremental-indexer.md (Draft title Incremental Indexer); authorization short name is Index Builder — no Layer 2 rename required for B.2. Own packages/ingestion/src/incremental/** only. Consume frozen public APIs of 103 (createTreeSitterParser / SyntaxTree), 104 (createSymbolExtractor / Symbol), and 105 (createDependencyGraph / computeDelta / applyDelta / dependents) — do not rewrite parser/**, extractor/**, or dependency/** except documented defect fixes under separate 103/104/105 auth. B.2 freeze is independent of Memory Engine (201): coordination + in-process IndexDelta planning/apply surface only; Draft §11 graph persistence, §12 MCP, embeddings, live 101 adapters, and full-spec 201 upserts are deferred. R1 (105 keysByFile multi-file ownership) is accepted B.2 debt — 102 must not expand 105 scope to 'fix' R1; document reindex scope policy under R1. No packages/core edits (optional read of watcher/context types only), no 201/301, no indexer IPC required for merge. Layer 4 defines B.2 independent freeze gates. Implementation not authorized by governance artifacts alone.
